chunks.text: THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. Present: Justice Jawad Akbar Sarwana Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.S- 323 of 2025 Applicant: Abdul Sattar s/o Muhammad Yaqoob through M/s Ghulam Muhammad and Nasrullah Khaskheli, Advocates Respondent No.1 & 5: SHO PS Daur District Shaheed Benazirabad and The State through Miss Safa Hisbani, A.P.G. Respondent No.2: Inayatullah s/o Rehmatullah Brohi Respondent No.3: Naimatullah s/o Rehmatullah Brohi Respondent No.4: Mst. Hajran w/o Naimatullah Brohi. Nemo. However one Haji Ghulam Rasool, who claims he is grandfather of respondents/proposed accused is present in person. Date of Hearing: 27.11.2025 Date of Order: 02.12.2025 O R D E R JAWAD AKBAR SARWANA, J.: For reasons to follow, the impugned Order dated 15.05.2025, passed by the learned 1st Additional Session Judge/Ex Officio Justice of Peace, Shaheed Benazirabad, in Cr. Misc. Appln. No.775/2025 is set aside, and the police authorities are directed to record the statement of the applicant/complainant and take further action in accordance with the law. JUDGE Tufail
